'''Vreshann Electronics, Incorporated''' was a [[Gotal/Legends|Gotal]] company that manufactured electronics. During the height of the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]], this company was known for developing scanning devices such as the [[EMS Scanner]].

{{Company-stub}}
